name: Roy Cooper
subject: Let's strengthen confidence in our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We can do better.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ec1/2fde7c66/4806ea23/15685818/656016147/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-lameduck?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20181218_email_RC&source=20181218_email_RC")
---
North Carolinians deserve honest and fair elections, Friend.

Each day, though, it looks more and more like that may not have been the case in the NC-09 congressional race. Republicans in the legislature _should_ want to do more to protect our elections from real threats like we're seeing in NC-09. Just this week, though, they passed a bill making it harder to root out corruption in elections and campaign finance. **We should be making it harder for politicians and others who violate campaign finance laws -- not easier. We shouldn't be handcuffing our investigators who are tasked with looking into these complaints.** [**We can do better, Friend. Add your name if you 're with me.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ec1/2fde7c66/4806ea23/1568581b/656016147/VEsE/ "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-up-for-our-elections-veto?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+We+can+do+better+FIRSTNAMEFriend+Add+you&utm_campaign=20181218_email_RC&source=20181218_email_RC") We're seeing a clear-cut example of potential election fraud right here in our state.

This gives us an opportunity to strengthen confidence in our elections. We shouldn't weaken it with added secrecy and roadblocks for investigators and prosecutors.

Republicans in the legislature have the chance to do the right thing here.

[**I 'm asking them to do that. Add your name here.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ec1/2fde7c66/4806ea23/1568581a/656016147/VEsF/ "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-up-for-our-elections-veto?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Irsquom+asking+them+to+do+that+Add+your+&utm_campaign=20181218_email_RC&source=20181218_email_RC")

Thanks for all you continue to do for our state,

Roy | [Add Your Name](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ec1/2fde7c66/4806ea23/1568581d/656016147/VEsC/ "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-up-for-our-elections-veto?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=20181218_email_RC&source=20181218_email_RC")
---

* * *

---

Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

Just this week, though, they passed a bill making it harder to root out corruption in elections and campaign finance. We should be making it harder for politicians and others who violate campaign finance laws -- not easier. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: As 2018 closes, 6 big priorities at the White House
body:
Starting from Inauguration Day, President Donald J. Trump pledged not to rest until he delivered on his promise to fix Washington.

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c1fc1708b&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • December 18, 2018

** As 2018 closes, 6 big priorities at the White House
------------------------------------------------------------
>From day one, President Donald J. Trump pledged not to rest until he delivered on his promise to fix Washington. That commitment doesn’t take a break for the holidays.

>From border security and school safety to reinvigorating America’s space program, here’s an inside look at six big priorities the Administration is working on this week:
* Securing our border: Today, Press Secretary Sarah Sanders reiterated the message President Trump delivered to Democratic leaders last week: He will not back down until he can make sure that American citizens are protected. Watch a clip from her interview with Fox News this morning (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82f4bcc619&e=3ee4985eea) .

* Building the Space Force: President Trump took a crucial step toward creation of the Space Force by directing the Department of Defense to establish a Combatant Command, which will oversee all U.S. military activities in space. See Vice President Mike Pence’s full speech at Kennedy Space Center (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=420c087cde&e=3ee4985eea) .

* Keeping our kids safe: After the tragic shooting in Parkland, Florida, President Trump established the School Safety Commission to make recommendations on how to prevent violence in our schools. Today, the Commission released its final 180-page report. Get the facts and see their recommendations. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9535ce31c8&e=3ee4985eea)

* Banning bump stocks: Earlier this year, the President instructed the Department of Justice to review a rule that would ban all devices that turn legal weapons into machineguns. Acting Attorney General Matthew Whitaker has signed the final rule. “We will continue to take illegal guns off of our streets.” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eda1651567&e=3ee4985eea)

* Reforming our prisons: Historic, bipartisan criminal justice reform is moving closer to President Trump's desk. “Our whole Nation benefits if former inmates are able to reenter society as productive, law-abiding citizens,” the President says. Why he supports the First Step Act. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=532e7f7c15&e=3ee4985eea)

* Delivering for American farmers: This week, President Trump plans to sign another important piece of bipartisan legislation—the 2018 “farm bill,” which will strengthen American agriculture. “Our economy is stronger than ever–we stand with our Farmers!” the President tweeted this week.

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump take their Official Christmas Portrait in the Cross Hall of the White House | December 15, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8c05ee1eb&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b11a04cfe&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f32d661a9d)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Jason Yates
subject: Do you think President Trump should build the wall?
body:
| | Congress needs to hear from you!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6J04YlMX_cahUJE-k6Hp9pILrvNxD7rTk-QhbUxH7ew&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181219p2a01&n=1)
| Peter, The caravan is at the border, President Trump is asking for Congress to fund the wall, and some of the biggest immigration issues such as DACA recipients’ status are still unsolved. Do you think a wall should be built? It’s crucial that your representatives in Congress hear what you think about immigration. The issues are complex, and we don’t all have the same opinions. **That’s why** **I want to help you build a customized message that you can send to your representatives today.** **_[Please take a couple of minutes to answer a few short questions to craft your personal message to your representatives now](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6J04YlMX_cahUJE-k6Hp9pILrvNxD7rTk-QhbUxH7ew&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181219p2a01&n=2)_!** Congress needs to hear from you on this important issue _before_ the end of the year. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6J04YlMX_cahUJE-k6Hp9pILrvNxD7rTk-QhbUxH7ew&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181219p2a01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181219p2a01&n=4)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Senate Passes Landmark Prison Reform Bill Marking a Major Bipartisan Win for President Trump
body:
"The Senate on Tuesday approved the most sweeping prison reform bill in years," one that aims to keep inmates from ending up back behind bars... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45619b826c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Senate Passes Landmark Prison Reform Bill Marking a Major Bipartisan Win for President Trump**

“The Senate on Tuesday approved the most sweeping prison reform bill in years,” one that aims to keep inmates from ending up back behind bars after they serve their time, Stephen Dinan reports for _The Washington Times._

“The measure cleared on an 87-12 vote and marks a major bipartisan victory for President Trump, who had pressured GOP leaders to pass it this year, before lawmakers closed down Congress . . . Dubbed the First Step Act, the legislation would expand prison programs designed to reduce recidivism and allow some prisoners to earn credits toward early release by taking part in those programs.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5955958359&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “With NASA’s Vehicle Assembly Building and a SpaceX rocket as his backdrop, Vice President Mike Pence announced Tuesday the nation’s plans to return to dominance in space. It’ll do it, first, by creating a U.S. Space Command, the 11th unified combatant command in the country,” Chabeli Herrera writes in the _[Orlando Sentinel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd22452a3c&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| The President’s Commission on School Safety, which President Trump created in response to the Parkland, Florida, shooting in February, issued its final report on preventing school violence yesterday. “The 177-page report also tackles building security, violence in the media, and school resource officers, and opposes raising the age for buying guns,” Fred Lucas writes in _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73bfc66878&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration on Tuesday took first steps to ban the sale of bump stocks on semi-automatic weapons and has made them illegal to possess beginning in late March,” Andrew O’Reilly reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f1a646d07&e=3ee4985eea). “In March, President Donald Trump said his administration would ‘ban’ the devices, which he said ‘turn legal weapons into illegal machines.’”
---
|
---
| In _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ead93863fb&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Rep. Debbie Lesko (R-AZ) writes that she “recently visited the United States-Mexico border in Nogales, Arizona, where [she] met with Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agents and was briefed on the challenges of an unsecured border. The problem we are dealing with is not just illegal immigration; there are illicit drugs flowing through our borders, human trafficking, and dangerous cartels exploiting vulnerable women and children. The biggest takeaway: We need the wall and the wall will work.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d32451bb3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1175df0904&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cf49acd78c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Wayne MacDonald
subject: Seriously
body:
Derek... Losing the House, Senate, and Executive Council is hard to grasp. But the good news is that we will come back twice as strong in 2020. **New Hampshire Republicans don't go down without a fight!** A new Party Chairman will be elected in January and I am committed to making sure they are able to succeed on day one. The next Chairman will need resources to build a winning operation. I am hoping that you can **[make a commitment](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30ML8n7ItowWcaGgNLKZMNvTuAtnfs-2FbkDLK-2BdHcum467OO9l3oTeGXGfyjlp8eAVrAPahrLtera7emeETjKhTYLeE45AuAJtmds5M6LWZOjwTG-2FTv7cIM29l3MsTNO6YOzYQqcAR8aUSpM461-2FFDmn0HxN29pmkduwc1mIG3UMki8Z9zt8at1R01sybnrhT0S3b84-2Fm-2BbT5BlzEWGSVEhOEAU0-2BiYoje18x9CB4M6YK2HZpTu0RY54BgZ3-2FRSObutm3P7r7JfmJF84JVOPu8SW-2FQ-3D-3D) **to your Party by renewing or activating your **2019 Digital Membership in the New Hampshire GOP** with at least $35 or more! [ **RENEW** ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30ML8n7ItowWcaGgNLKZMNvTuAtnfs-2FbkDLK-2BdHcum467OO9l3oTeGXGfyjlp8eAVrAPahrLtera7emeETjKhTYLWYaJW1AyTB4FzzaS1NQ-2FdQnsm7VdzA62RBe361ky797STE7IukuotPmnpJpueLoz-2F-2Bd2vH4yKyKsqfrgBbtl4r5JAYr9kY0oGYftvbGYarv8ut6yyHYvHGqCvDNkfweoXK7idKPuhqHPtUsS-2BZsAgldo4ePrvKkphiusEpqNlMSXc4b8PQdulqE7lhjMtsFOg-3D-3D) [ **ACTIVATE** ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30ML8n7ItowWcaGgNLKZMNvTuAtnfs-2FbkDLK-2BdHcum467OO9l3oTeGXGfyjlp8eAVrAPahrLtera7emeETjKhTYLaTGMwEkC-2FxYTktJtaccsHTZErrpjc74z-2B-2BVrTERy-2F-2BkO3ddc-2BTAhc22vJJC13MIUVgjrT4R844-2BYh0ZRghc0bu8lf33-2FXqBJ4TfWf99sdURHNiM1YsuzuHsQRQb455fxfo-2FPOIE9n5g4BUgNOgOk-2BGXoNkwLsOdcyX2sAJxboh4Tp5ipKe3m3Nm-2FnXVHFDZuA-3D-3D) Our State is flourishing under Governor Sununu. It was just announced that we have hit 2.5% unemployment. This is the lowest the rate has been since 1988. It is obvious Republican policies are working for us. That's why we need a strong and effective State GOP. **Please join me in supporting our Party.** It is imperative that we continue to fight. **[Your membership renewal of $35 or something more generous will give our new Chairman clout as they work to win back our state legislature!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30ML8n7ItowWcaGgNLKZMNvTuAtnfs-2FbkDLK-2BdHcum467OO9l3oTeGXGfyjlp8eAVrAPahrLtera7emeETjKhTYLU4FgaI7-2FtRNI7uQ-2FhAZ5Zx2uG-2BUwYTBOhhTJxqk-2BqpBhiL-2BlMagBcKyLww8L-2Fc4qK4w3dD-2BeFL16O-2F5b48YY2NPVgex0NJVud5aCCmAoIQQTbFIUWPeH3K1TiWo-2BlG0LkPeT8Kn5KRCdqKY7s7koZnFrFB4vhbCXNQUP7H-2Fqx5Vuu3YU2v5drPNBanEE5xUdA-3D-3D)** **** Regards, Wayne MacDonald NHGOP Chairman

clean_body: Derek... Losing the House, Senate, and Executive Council is hard to grasp. But the good news is that we will come back twice as strong in 2020. New Hampshire Republicans don't go down without a fight! A new Party Chairman will be elected in January and I am committed to making sure they are able to succeed on day one. The next Chairman will need resources to build a winning operation. I am hoping that you can to your Party by renewing or activating your 2019 Digital Membership in the New Hampshire GOP with at least $35 or more! Our State is flourishing under Governor Sununu. It was just announced that we have hit 2.5% unemployment. This is the lowest the rate has been since 1988. It is obvious Republican policies are working for us. That's why we need a strong and effective State GOP. Please join me in supporting our Party. It is imperative that we continue to fight. ** Regards, Wayne MacDonald NHGOP Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301

name: EMILY's List
subject: BY TOMORROW: Become a 2019 member
